title: Extra Ore Mod
description: A mod that adds more ores and utilities for Minecraft. Still in early development.
body:
# Extra Ore Mod

This brand new mod aims to add a host of new resources, ores, tools, and utilties to Minecraft with an ever growing list of items to discover from deep ravines to towering mountains. Some resorces come from prosessing existing materials, like rubber scraps and wires. This mod will fill your world with endless discoveries from new ores to unlocking recipes alike.

... So enjoy the new mod!🥳

## Full List Of Features
This mod is still quite small, but nonetheless here it is:
### Items
- Ruby
- Raw Ruby
- Rubber Scrap
- Reel
- Reel of Rubber
- Copper Wire
- Metal Detector
- Reel of Copper Wire
### Blocks
- Block Of Ruby
- Block Of Raw Ruby
- Ruby Ore
- Deepslate Ruby Ore
- Nether Ruby Ore
- End Stone Ruby Ore
- The Corrupt Block(Won't stay for long)

## Dependencies
In the newest version,`1.0-PR7-1.20.4`, the only dependency is `Fabric API`. Remember that this is prone to changing with coming versions!
